title: kersia foliosa
intro: Kersia foliosa, commonly known as the Kersia tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The health benefits of Kersia foliosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, making it useful in the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Kersia foliosa include limonoids and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
